content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement loop as a base framework that can be augmented by multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that preserves its core advantage of no extra training or supervision while boosting refinement quality far beyond single-perspective self-feedback. This hybrid framework would force the LLM to challenge its own initial output from multiple unaligned internal viewpoints, rather than only iterating on feedback from a single fixed perspective.
